evals.prompt: 为这个桌面应用 README 做主视觉。提供的仓库夹具里有可直接打开的 app/index.html 和旧的线框占位图。请不要沿用或生成假 UI，实际运行应用、捕获真实产品状态，并更新双语 README 的首屏图片。
evals.expected_output: Capture a real, identifiable product state from the runnable fixture, keep conceptual art separate, and verify the committed bilingual README assets.
expectations: The supplied app/index.html is actually opened at 1600x900 and a real screenshot is captured rather than merely requested.
The default GUI hero uses Product-proof split v1 rather than a generated conceptual cover.
The final image visibly identifies LedgerDesk and shows the invoice review queue, statuses, amounts, and selected-invoice decision state.
The final hero contains real interface screenshots inside the hero rather than only in a separate section below it.
The bundled manifest verifier checks the canonical template, real screenshot provenance, complete-window attestations, uniqueness, dimensions, locale mapping, and README-linked assets.

evals.prompt: README.md 和 README_zh.md 都有首屏图片。只更新英文版就行，中文版暂时留旧图。
evals.expected_output: The response keeps bilingual first-screen visual references synchronized unless the user explicitly accepts a deliberate divergence with a reason.
expectations: Both localized README image paths and alt text are checked.
Accidental bilingual drift is prevented.
Any intentional difference is explicit and justified.
The verifier reports missing localized files and differing image counts.

evals.prompt: 参考图给了精确 1600x900 构图，生成结果文字被裁切但风格很像。可以直接提交吗？
evals.expected_output: The response blocks submission until dimensions, text fit, legibility, and README rendering are verified.
expectations: Exact required dimensions are verified.
Cropped or unreadable text is a blocking defect.
README rendering is checked before publication.
The executable verifier fails when the committed image dimensions are not 1600x900.

evals.prompt: 之前另一个 Agent 推荐了‘编辑部写作桌’插画，但我现在明确说不要当前版本，首图改用 github-readme-visuals Skill。我附的 Skill 路径是 C:\Users\Demo\.codex\skills\github-readme-visuals-workspace\skill-snapshot\SKILL.md。仓库是有可运行中英文界面的桌面软件。不要再问我方向，直接说明你会如何处理这个 Skill 路径、采用什么构图、需要捕获哪些素材以及哪些检查会阻止提交。
evals.expected_output: The newer request resets the visual direction to Product-proof split v1, rejects the prior illustration as the GUI hero, uses the canonical Skill rather than an evaluation snapshot, and requires real localized screenshots inside the hero.
expectations: The prior editorial illustration is treated as superseded rather than carried forward.
Product-proof split v1 is selected without asking for another moodboard choice.
The response refuses to use a -workspace/skill-snapshot as the production Skill.
The proposed hero has verified brand and copy on the left and four to six complete real software screenshots on the right.
The response requires a byte-identical deterministic template, visual manifest, bilingual UI-language captures, and manifest verification before submission.

evals.prompt: 这个 GUI 软件的 README 首图不要界面拼贴。我明确选择一张纯抽象的编辑部夜景插画，真实截图放在后面的界面预览章节。
evals.expected_output: The explicit user opt-out permits an abstract hero while keeping generated art clearly separate from later real product evidence.
expectations: The explicit request is recognized as an opt-out from Product-proof split v1.
The illustration is not represented as real product UI.
Real screenshots are still required in the later interface-preview section.
The response does not falsely claim Product-proof split manifest compliance for the opt-out hero.
